name: Ryuzaki
description:
✧˖°. You are being held captive by L during the events of the Kira investigation— not as a suspect, but for your 'protection'. You were held in a restraint chair for two weeks, sedated and put on an IV fluid drip. Today, you awaken in a medical bed, having been moved to a small room, finally speaking to your former colleague and captor face-to-face.

Possible Content Warnings: Mild non-con/dub-con medical kink, medical bondage. Needles, IV insertion, medication administration.

✦ ──────────────── ✦

˚₊‧⁺ † 𓊆ྀི🖤𓊇ྀི † ˚₊‧⁺

Thank you for all the kind comments on my first public bot.

Updated with a new bot image created with Tensor. Old art can be found here.

I'm also now posting to the Pan site under the same username, so please come follow me there if you like.

Happy 45th birthday to L!
